title: springy german smoky matcha noodles
description: tender, smoky matcha noodles served with a side of nimono simmer sauce, a crowd-pleaser in german cuisine. perfect for a springtime meal.

ingredients.name: soba noodles
ingredients.notes: use high-quality, Japanese-style soba noodles for best results.

ingredients.name: turmeric powder
ingredients.notes: enhances the yellow color of the dish.

ingredients.name: cayenne pepper
ingredients.notes: adds a touch of smokiness without overpowering the dish.

instructions: cook soba noodles according to package instructions.
in a medium saucepan, combine lemon juice, olive oil, matcha powder, turmeric powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper, whisking to combine.
add kombu seaweed to the saucepan and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the seaweed is tender.
strain the seaweed from the saucepan and discard.
serve the cooked soba noodles with the matcha sauce spooned over the top, along with a side of nimono simmer sauce.
